schemas.headline: Best Monthly Dividend Stocks & ETFs (2026)
schemas.description: Complete 2026 list of the best monthly dividend stocks, REITs, BDCs, and ETFs ranked by yield.

mainEntity.name: What are the best monthly dividend stocks?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some of the most popular monthly dividend stocks include Realty Income (O), Main Street Capital (MAIN), STAG Industrial (STAG), and Agree Realty (ADC).

mainEntity.name: What is the highest yielding monthly dividend stock?

acceptedAnswer.text: Often, Business Development Companies (BDCs) like Prospect Capital (PSEC) or Mortgage REITs like ARMOUR Residential REIT (ARR) offer the highest monthly yields, though they carry significantly more risk than lower-yielding alternatives.
Popular ETFs that pay monthly dividends include JPMorgan Equity Premium Income ETF (JEPI), Invesco S&P 500 High Dividend Low Volatility ETF (SPHD), and SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF (DIA).

mainEntity.name: Are monthly dividend stocks a good investment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly dividend stocks can be excellent for income investors seeking regular cash flow to cover living expenses or for compounding returns faster through frequent reinvestment. However, total return and dividend safety are more important than payout frequency.

mainEntity.name: Is Realty Income (O) a good stock to buy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Realty Income (O) is considered a blue-chip REIT and is famous for trademarking 'The Monthly Dividend Company.' It has a long track record of consistent monthly payouts and slow, steady dividend increases.
